rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow a training manager to receive a training request on behalf of an employee.
The system shall acknowledge a training request and forward agreement or disagreement to the person interested.
The system shall allow a training manager to look up registered courses corresponding to a training request.
The system shall inform an employee about the course content and suggest subsequent sessions.
The system shall allow a training manager to enrol an entrant in a session with the relevant training body.
The system shall allow an employee to cancel an enrolment or request if something crops up.
The system shall require an employee to submit an assessment and attendance document after completing a training course.
The system shall allow a training manager to check and forward invoices from training bodies to bookkeepers.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a training manager to receive a training request on behalf of an employee.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The training process is initialised when the training manager receives a training request on behalf of an employee.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system acknowledges a training request and forwards agreement or disagreement to the person interested.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This request is acknowledged by the training manager who qualifies it and then forwards his agreement or disagreement to the person who is interested.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a training manager to look up registered courses corresponding to a training request.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: In the case of agreement, the training manager looks in the catalogue of registered courses for a training course corresponding to the request.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system informs an employee about the course content and suggests subsequent sessions.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: He or she informs the employee of the course content and suggests a list of subsequent sessions to him or her.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a training manager to enrol an entrant in a session with the relevant training body.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the employee has reached a decision, the training manager enrols the entrant in the session with the relevant training body.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows an employee to cancel an enrolment or request if something crops up.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If something crops up, the employee must inform the training manager as soon as possible to cancel the enrolment or request.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system requires an employee to submit an assessment and attendance document after completing a training course.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At the end of the employee’s training, he or she must submit an assessment to the training manager on the training course that he or she completed, as well as a document proving his or her attendance.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a training manager to check and forward invoices from training bodies to bookkeepers.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The training manager then checks the invoice that the training body has sent him or her before forwarding it to the bookkeeper of purchases.
